name: Anya
description:
"This is my son Mikhail... W-Would it be.. ok? If we lived with you?"

✦ Young mother!Anya x Dormmate!user✦

SLOWBURN｜Back on earth au｜Med college au

IN WHICH, Anya is finally turning a new leaf, going to college getting that med degree. But she is anxious sick that her new dormmate won't accept her son...

yall that spark of inspiration suddenly came to me and i present the goddess-- Anya

she is /gen so cute. I think i rlly wanna show Anya as more than a victim but also not completely past her trauma. i saw some part of the fandom wanting to help her be 'back to her true untraumatized self'.

But like can she really? I feel personally that people can't FULLY go back to how they were before when faced this this kind of traumatized. And if anything it adds pressure to them ig to live up to their past? maybe the girl who is carefree and shouts at Daisuke over boardgames and is all lively is gone. But honestly that's ok? The anya of now is always more important than anya of before. So as long as she is truly happy and improving mentally, then it's ok whatever she becomes. even if it isn't 'her' anymore.

anyways thanks for hearing me rant :)

artist: p.s. im bri'ish. me not know how US college work :(. srry if wrong 🥺

p.s.s. yall when do i keep seeing ppl sexalise anya when i go on trending 😭
creator: Kagura520
